title: BrandResearchFindings
description: initial-setup — one brand-researcher angle's findings: public-source evidence grounding the user's pointers, plus data-derived category/persona candidates the interview presents as CHOICES. NOT user-defined; NOT fabricated — every candidate traces to evidence.

angle.description: which research lens this artifact covers

sources_consulted.description: every public source actually fetched/searched (honest — drives coverage)

ref.description: URL or search query actually used

evidence.description: concrete observations from the sources — facts, not interpretation. Each candidate below must trace here.

persona_candidates.description: data-derived persona options for the interview to present as CHOICES (not free-form)

who.description: who this buyer is, in plain terms

evidence_refs.description: review/page observations grounding this persona — no fabrication

forbidden_claim_risks.description: claims observed on the page/reviews that may be over-claims to guard against downstream

coverage_flags.description: what could NOT be reached/found — honest gaps, never silent
